title: Add durations at the bottom of the column and in charts

posts.author: Claus (Claus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It would be good if the board could add the durations calculated with the duration function (HOURS_DIFF).

This happens on the Dashboard too: it’s not possible to get a chart showing the aggregate duration of different items.

Would love you to consider a solution for this.

Thanks in advance
